svg.title: Phase 1 – startup and upload
svg.desc: Worker startup loads model from object storage via DB metadata. User uploads video, API stores it and enqueues a job, returning job_id immediately.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the database store for model metadata?')
sendPrompt('Why store the model in object storage instead of database?')
sendPrompt('What does the worker do at startup?')
g.text: starts up, loads model into RAM
stays resident — no reload per job

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the user send in the upload request?')
sendPrompt('What does the API do on upload?')
sendPrompt('Why keep the video in object storage until export?')
sendPrompt('What payload goes into the Redis queue?')
sendPrompt('How often should the client poll for results?')
sendPrompt('What does the result store contain?')
